name: @tank/hono-mastery
description: Build and deploy multi-runtime TypeScript APIs with Hono. Covers routing, Context API, built-in and custom middleware, Zod/Valibot validation, RPC mode with hc client, OpenAPI integration, testing, error handling, and deployment to Cloudflare Workers, Bun, Deno, Node.js, AWS Lambda, and Vercel. Triggers: hono, hono js, hono framework, hono vs express, hono cloudflare workers, hono rpc, hono middleware, hono zod openapi, hono d1, hono bun, hono deno.
